content: We can reframe the Transformer attention mechanism for episodic memory as an implicit active learning selector for agent memory, where attention weights naturally encode the curiosity-driven information gain scores that 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agents explicitly optimize. This lets agents dynamically expand working memory capacity by only querying and encoding high-information-gain episodic traces, rather than storing all past experience.
source_topics: Transformer attention mechanism for episodic memory
trigger_topic: Transformer attention mechanism for episodic memory
